info.title: Cardre v2 API
info.description: Auditable open-source credit scorecard builder — v2.

get.description: List all registered projects from the registry.

post.description: Create a new project by bootstrapping a fresh store at body.path.

get.description: Get a single project by ID, resolved via the registry.

UnavailableProjectResponse.title: UnavailableProjectResponse
UnavailableProjectResponse.description: A registered project that could not be opened (corrupt, missing, etc).
